title: StackPlus
description: This MOD increases the maximum stack size of items from 64 to 99.
body:
## What is StackPlus?
StackPlus increases the maximum stack size of **all items** to **99**, making inventory management much smoother.

---

## Features
- **No setup required:**  
  Just install the mod and it's ready to use!
- **Works with all items:**  
  All item stacks are increased to 99.

---

## Screenshot
